DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO & TAX COLLECTOR

PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JOANNE ADAMS, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JOANNE MADDEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT AJALA, OLADIPUPO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-05-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-09-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JOANNE ADAMS, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANNE PEEBLES; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-09-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AJALA, OLADIPUPO $3,808.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,883.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
